notes: Foundational EcoGII set; MNase-solubilized oligonucleosomes (short fibers). Ramani HMM caller = gold standard. VERIFY PacBio SRP (GSE162410 SuperSeries appears to also host ONT runs).
Tn5-tagmentation low-input. Open samples = OS152 + mESC. fibertools already installed -> fastest PacBio path.
106.2 Gb; replication timepoints. Uses SAMOSA-ChAAT HMM pipeline -> direct benchmark.
Also has m6A+CpG+GpC multi-enzyme variant (exercises 3 contexts). S3 raw mirror in paper. Small yeast genome = cheap pilot.
R10 available (better basecalls). Documents strong m6A MTase motif bias + k-mer normalization (Zenodo 10925534) -> emission calibration. Cross-enzyme EcoGII vs Hia5.
Adaptive-sampling targeted (centromere/telomere/rDNA). Non-Western repo (China NGDC). Repeat-region emission training.
ANTIBODY-DIRECTED (protein proximity, NOT accessibility). Use to validate the modification-detection layer, not accessibility semantics.
Deepest long-read GpC set (GM12878 250Gb/103X, N50 14kb). Endogenous CpG must be separated from GpC. Processed-only: GSE155791/Zenodo 3969567 (NOT trainable).
Yeast lacks endogenous CpG -> clean CpG accessibility. median read ~5.1kb.
In-vivo expressed MTase. GATC (Dam) is sparse -> low-density stress mode.
Dual-enzyme max density. In-vitro reconstituted -> clean ground truth.
SHORT-READ single-molecule (<=300bp). Not compatible with current long-read architecture. Defines a future short-fiber emission class.
Single-cell, very short/sparse. Future stress-test mode only.
Founding GpC method; predates standardized deposition.
Locus-specific amplicon. Future short-fiber locus mode.
